overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a vehicle driving through Night City. The journey traverses massive concrete highway interchanges, elevated roads with towering megastructures, a brief tunnel passage, and gritty urban streets lined with trash and graffiti, concluding at a futuristic gas station. Bright sunny conditions with clear skies throughout the drive.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-level highway interchange with directional signage

events.description: emerging from under dense overpass structure into more open area with industrial tanks visible

agents.ego_description: following a silver sedan through the highway interchange, navigating under massive concrete structures

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving ahead of ego vehicle through the interchange

entered.detail: massive concrete highway structure with multiple levels and support pillars
green highway signs indicating directions to Westbrook, Santo Domingo, and El Camino Real
large spherical industrial tanks visible in the background

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives through a dense highway interchange beneath massive concrete overpasses. Directional signs for Westbrook and Santo Domingo hang overhead while industrial storage tanks are visible in the distance. The camera follows a silver sedan through the semi-covered corridor before emerging into a more open area.

events.description: vehicle curves left around the base of the massive tower structure while ascending the ramp

agents.ego_description: accelerating on elevated highway alongside massive futuristic architecture, curving around the megatower

entered.detail: massive futuristic skyscraper with geometric glass and steel facade dominating the skyline
elevated monorail track structure running parallel to the highway

segments.scene_description: The scene opens onto an elevated highway bathed in bright sunlight. A massive futuristic megatower rises on the right, its geometric facade reflecting the sun. The vehicle curves left around the tower's base while monorail tracks run parallel on the left. The industrial tanks fade from view as the highway ascends.

events.description: entering enclosed tunnel with artificial lighting and concrete walls
transition from bright sunlight to dim artificial tunnel lighting

agents.ego_description: maintaining speed through tunnel entrance and continuing through the dimly lit corridor

entered.detail: colorful graffiti mural painted on the tunnel entrance wall
smooth concrete walls with geometric paneling and overhead lighting fixtures
rectangular overhead LED light panels illuminating the tunnel

segments.scene_description: The vehicle approaches a tunnel entrance marked by a colorful mural on the right wall. Upon entering, the lighting shifts dramatically from bright sun to artificial overhead LEDs. The tunnel features smooth concrete walls with geometric paneling as the vehicle maintains speed through the enclosed corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: gritty urban street with trash and graffiti

events.description: exiting tunnel into bright daylight urban environment with pedestrians visible
navigating through intersection with pedestrians crossing and other vehicles present

agents.ego_description: driving through dense urban area with pedestrians on sidewalks, navigating around trash piles and parked vehicles

notable_agents.action: person walking on sidewalk near piles of trash bags

entered.detail: large digital billboards including one with a woman's face and 'POUCHES' advertisement
large piles of garbage bags and debris accumulated on the sidewalk
concrete walls covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
tall palm trees lining the urban street
derelict industrial buildings with boarded windows and decaying facades

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel, the vehicle enters a gritty urban street bathed in sunlight. Large digital billboards tower above while trash piles and graffiti-covered walls line the sidewalks. Pedestrians walk among the debris, and palm trees contrast with the decaying industrial buildings. The vehicle navigates through moderate traffic and scattered pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic gas station with neon signage

events.description: approaching illuminated gas station canopy with neon fuel signs

agents.ego_description: slowing slightly while passing the futuristic gas station area with neon signage

entered.detail: futuristic fuel station with green canopy, neon 'FUEL' and 'CHOOH2' signage, and illuminated price displays
vertical digital displays showing fuel prices in red and blue neon

segments.scene_description: The vehicle approaches a futuristic gas station with a green canopy and bright neon signage displaying 'FUEL' and 'CHOOH2'. Digital price boards glow with red and blue numbers. The surrounding area features industrial buildings with smoke stacks in the background. The graffiti walls shift to the left as the vehicle passes the station and continues toward the distant cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dense industrial highway interchange into the gritty, neon-lit streets of a futuristic city. It begins beneath massive concrete overpasses and directional signs, following a silver sedan as it emerges from the semi-covered corridor into bright sunlight. As the highway ascends, the scene opens up to reveal a towering geometric megastructure and parallel monorail tracks before the vehicle plunges into a tunnel, where the lighting shifts abruptly from natural sun to artificial overhead LEDs. The camera then exits the tunnel into a decaying urban district characterized by towering digital billboards, graffiti-covered walls, and palm trees amidst piles of trash. Finally, the vehicle glides past a futuristic gas station with a glowing green canopy and neon signage before continuing toward the distant cityscape.
